h: While dingoes will happily eat many different animals out in the wild, there aren’t many creatures which come hunting after them. One of their biggest threats are their peers, since it isn’t likely that both dogs will last in a fight! Aside from this, farmers might try to shoot at them if they come close to a farm, or a crocodile might occasionally attempt a dingo for dinner.
